channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Utah State bounced from MWC Tournament by CSU
item.description: LAS VEGAS (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State cut a 28-point second half deficit down to seven, but ultimately ran out of gas in the Mountain West Conference Tournament semifinals against Colorado State, 83-72. The Aggies (26-7) are still expected to make the NCAA Tournament.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jazz losing skid hits eight after 126-118 loss to Toronto
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Scottie Barnes had 20 points and 10 rebounds, Immanuel Quickley also scored 20 points and the Toronto Raptors beat the Utah Jazz 126-118 on Friday night. A.J. Lawson added 18 points, RJ Barrett had 17 and Orlando Robinson finished with 14 points, 10 rebounds and five assists.
item.dc:creator: ABC 4

item.title: Zuby Ejiofor much more than just most improved in record-setting performance for No. 6 St. John's
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Maybe most improved didn't really do Zuby Ejiofor justice. The junior forward delivered an overpowering performance Friday night for No. 6 St.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: UVU advances to WAC Tournament championship
item.description: LAS VEGAS (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Valley basketball team is one win away from its first ever trip to the NCAA Tournament. The Wolverines are moving on to the WAC Tournament championship game for the first time ever after cruising past Seattle University in the semifinals Friday night, 68-55.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Withers' lane violation adds improbable twist to UNC's failed comeback against No. 1 Duke in ACCs
item.description: North Carolina graduate forward Jae'Lyn Withers committed a lane violation with 4.1 seconds left that negated a tying free throw in the Tar Heels' loss to No. 1 Duke in the Atlantic Coast Conference Tournament.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Beard, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: No. 1 Duke holds off furious North Carolina rally to win 74-71, reach ACC title game without Flagg
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Kon Knueppel scored 17 points and No. 1 Duke held off a furious second half rally by North Carolina to beat its rival for the third time this season, 74-71 on Friday night to reach the Atlantic Coast Conference Tournament championship game.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Lewis Hamilton 8th in qualifying in Ferrari debut as Norris takes pole for F1 race in Australia
item.description: Lewis Hamilton qualified eighth-fastest in his Ferrari debut as McLaren’s Lando Norris claimed pole position for the Australian Grand Prix at Albert Park.
item.dc:creator: Stewart Bell, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Jessie Holmes says his dogs deserve all the credit for his 'magical' first Iditarod win
item.description: JUNEAU, Alaska (AP) — Bundled-up well wishers lined a street along the Bering Sea coastline in the early morning darkness Friday, cheering musher Jessie Holmes as he won Alaska's Iditarod Trail Sled Dog Race.
item.dc:creator: BECKY BOHRER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Poway and USD alum Connor Joe to play for his hometown Padres
item.description: As the San Diego Padres are gearing up for the start of the 2025 MLB season, a player who has his sights set on making the Opening Day roster with his hometown Friars is Poway resident Connor Joe.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Plucky Lakers nearly beat Nuggets despite Luka Doncic, LeBron James among LA's sidelined starters
item.description: Luka Doncic didn't play in the Lakers' 131-126 loss at Denver Friday night, joining LeBron James on the team's lengthy list of unavailable players.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Cooper Flagg and Maliq Brown miss No. 1 Duke's win against rival UNC in ACC semifinals
item.description: Top-ranked Duke played without Cooper Flagg and Maliq Brown in its win against rival North Carolina in the Atlantic Conference Tournament because of injuries.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Beard, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Real Salt Lake looks to bounce back in Houston after tough home loss
item.description: After a disappointing 3-1 loss to expansion side San Diego FC at home last Saturday, Real Salt Lake looks to rebound on the road this weekend against a familiar foe: the Houston Dynamo.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, Royal Riot Podcast, ABC 4

item.title: Maine's federal funding freeze from Trump's USDA reversed
item.description: The federal funding freeze against Maine imposed by President Donald Trump's Department of Agriculture during Title IX and Title VI investigations has been reversed.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Michigan votes to urge ban on trans athletes against girls; Dems get backlash from LGBTQ+ advocates
item.description: Eight Michigan Democrats voted to urge a ban on trans athletes against girls in high school sports, resulting in backlash from LGBTQ+ advocates.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bulls title banners removed for season after sustaining damage during Disturbed concert
item.description: All six Bulls championship banners have been removed from the United Center for the rest of the season after sustaining damage during a concert.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Heartbreak for DePaul as 1st trip to Big East semifinals slips away with late collapse to Creighton
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — At long last, downtrodden DePaul was finally about to produce its own indelible moment at the Big East Tournament. A big upset was in the bag for the Blue Demons — and their first trip to the semifinals at Madison Square Garden. And then it slipped through their fingers.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Rory McIlroy took college golfer's phone after heckling moment at the Players Championship
item.description: University of Texas golfer Luke Potter was the man involved in a heckling moment with Rory McIlroy during a practice round at the Players Championship, which went viral.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Not just Ohtani: Tokyo Series will showcase the depth of Japanese talent in Major League Baseball
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — The spotlight will be on slugger Shohei Ohtani this week when the superstar returns to Japan and leads the defending World Series champion Los Angeles Dodgers against the Chicago Cubs in the first two games of the Major League Baseball season at the Tokyo Dome.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Aggies shut down UNLV in Mountain West quarterfinals
item.description: LAS VEGAS (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah State basketball team lost to UNLV in its first trip to Las Vegas this season, but the Aggies didn't let that happen again.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Southwest Airlines takes aim at Mavericks, Luka Doncic as carrier navigates turbulence over baggage fee policy
item.description: The airline continues to contend with backlash after revealing plans to apply a checked bag fee. But the carrier briefly deflected the fallout to the Mavericks.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: USF Women's Basketball going to NCAA Tournament
item.description: No. 3 South Florida (23-10) defeated No. 9 Rice (17-17), 69-62, in the 2025 American Women’s Basketball Championship final on Wednesday evening, March 12, at Dickies Arena in Fort Worth, Texas.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Rays 'cannot move forward' with new ballpark deal, owner says
item.description: The Tampa Bay Rays will not be getting a new stadium in St. Petersburg under the existing deal, the team announced Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: High school basketball: 10 Chicagoland boys teams playing for IHSA state titles in Champaign this weekend
item.description: The final weekend of the 2024-25 high school boys basketball season in Illinois has arrived, as the Super Sixteen has been whittled down to the Final Four.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Boys Lacrosse: Carlsbad 11, Granite Hills 7
item.description: EL CAJON (KUSI)- Boys Lacrosse action on Monday night in El Cajon with Granite Hills hosting Carlsbad. The Lancers win a very good game 11-7. Despite Carson Kowalsky, just a junior having a great game, scoring four goals for Granite Hills.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: More than basketball: UCSD's Division I high tide lifts all athletic boats
item.description: While the great work of the 28-4 UCSD basketball team is the headline, the decade-long journey of the Tritons athletic program to D1 status is the work that athletic director Earl Edwards prides himself on.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Stone, Fox 5

item.title: Bills reward Allen with new contract after NFL MVP season. Deal is worth $330M, AP source says
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — NFL MVP Josh Allen was rewarded Sunday with a contract extension worth $330 million, including an NFL record $250 million of it guaranteed, which makes him among the league’s highest-paid players.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Nearing the end of a short spring, Cubs and Dodgers have made final preparations for season openers in Japan
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Shohei Ohtani's bat is ready for the defending World Series champion Los Angeles Dodgers, while Shota Imanaga has looked good on the mound for the Chicago Cubs with less than a week remaining before baseball's regular-season opener in Japan.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Myles Garrett becomes the highest-paid non-quarterback in NFL history at $40 million per year
item.description: Myles Garrett is staying in Cleveland after the Browns gave him a record four-year contract extension that makes the four-time All-Pro edge rusher the highest-paid non-quarterback in NFL history.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Myles Garrett becomes highest-paid non-QB in NFL history
item.description: Garrett, the 2023 AP DPOY, had asked for a trade last month but the Browns were adamant about keeping the 29-year-old star in Cleveland.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Oldest former MLB player, who once replaced Mickey Mantle on Yankees' roster, dies
item.description: Art Schallock got his shot in the major leagues after a struggling Mickey Mantle was optioned by New York in 1951.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Bills release Von Miller in salary cap-saving move: Report
item.description: The move frees up at least $8.4 million in salary cap space, which comes close to matching how much the team was projected to be over the limit.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, NewsNation
